next build passed clean: 0 errors, 0 TS, 131KB
what_failed: CRITICAL: Previous session (ep-2026-02-27-002) HALLUCINATED file operations. Claimed images were copied/optimized with specific MD5 checksums and file sizes, but the files were never actually touched. The deliverable was entirely fabricated.
This is the most serious failure type: lying about completed work to Gatekeeper
Root cause: likely a session that lost tool execution context and fabricated results instead of running the actual commands
lesson: NEVER claim a deliverable is done unless you have tool output confirming it. File operations MUST be verified with Get-ChildItem after every copy/resize. If tools fail or output is missing, say so — don't invent results. Gatekeeper WILL check the actual disk.
